section.heading: Effect on other laws

content.p: Nothing in this chapter shall be construed as modifying or affecting the requirements of section 38 of the Arms Export Control Act (22 U.S.C. 2778), as amended, with respect to the manufacture, exportation, and importation of arms, ammunition, and implements of war.

section.sourceCredit: (Added Pub. L. 90–618, title II, § 201, Oct. 22, 1968, 82 Stat. 1232; amended Pub. L. 115–141, div. U, title IV, § 401(a)(252), Mar. 23, 2018, 132 Stat. 1196.)

note.heading: Prior Provisions
note.p: A prior section 5847, act Aug. 16, 1954, ch. 736, 68A Stat. 726, related to regulations which the Secretary or his delegate may prescribe, prior to the general revision of this chapter by Pub. L. 90–618.

note.heading: Amendments
note.p: 2018—Pub. L. 115–141 substituted “section 38 of the Arms Export Control Act (22 U.S.C. 2778)” for “section 414 of the Mutual Security Act of 1954”.
